item.title: uh.
item.description: This is directed at 49,672,136 of you. For no particular reason. On another unrelated topic, Does anyone in Canada know of a patch of land where tiny octopus can set up shop?

item.title: Do Unmute and Take a Break from the Anxiety of Today
item.description: Peace to you, Imgur friend From NWE on Insta https://www.instagram.com/reel/DBgZFUToz6T/?igsh=MWVlM3Jrbmx0bWV1Nw== Lyrics: Ndikhokhele Bawo, zundi kokhele (Lead me oh Father [Lead mel) Ndikhokhele mmeli wami (Lead me my savior) Ezintsizini, Zalomhlaba Bawo (in all the sorrows of this world Father) (Bawo, Bawo, Bawo) (Father, Father, Father) Bawo ndiyabonga (Father I thank you) Ngoba wena usandigcinile (for you still protect/keep me) (Repeat) Thaluthele thuze kwami (You calm all my fears) x2 (Bawo, bawo, bawo) (Father, Father, Father) Bawo ndiyabonga (Father | thank you) Ngoba wena usandigcinile (for you still protect me) Mmeli wami bawo uthaluthele thuze kwami (Father, Savior, you calm my fears) Bawo ndiyabonga (Father I thank you) Ngoba wena usandigcinile (for you still protect me
item.dc:creator: hface18

item.title: Can’t Believe It’s Possible
item.description: I’m simply floored that people in America are perfectly ok with putting a convicted felon, liar, schoolyard bully, too many other descriptions to list, in charge of our country. I’m lost…. Edit: Well, the worst has come to pass. Democracy has ruled that we put this person into the highest office in the nation to represent us. Im sad, angry, upset, amazed, and ashamed. God help the US and the rest of the free world.
item.dc:creator: midwestmikey

item.title: You really didn't need the gift of hindsight to know this.
item.description: Thanks Biden and Garland, you useless sacks of shit.

item.title: I learned a new magic trick!
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/gIVisSorzHI Hopefully this video unlocked your childhood memory of using the Christmas gift wrap paper leftover cardboard tubes as lightsabers! Remember doing the sounds with your mouth too? That's where the inspo for this video comes from haha Have a great day everyone! Yuzu

item.title: HELLO IMGUR TODAY I AM THE SHOUTING BIOLOGIST AND HERE ARE SOME UNCONVENTIONAL SHAPED FOXES
item.description:
THIS IS THE TIBETAN FOX AND HIS HEAD IS VERY SQUARE.
THIS IS A KIT FOX. HE IS SLEEK AND SILVERY AND I LOVE HIM.
THIS IS AN ARCTIC FOX IN THE WINTER. THEY ARE NOT THAT COLOR WHEN IT IS NOT THE WINTER.
THIS IS A DARWIN'S FOX. I DON'T ACTUALLY KNOW WHY HE IS CALLED A DARWIN'S FOX.
AND HERE IS MY ABSOLUTE FAVORITE THE BAT-EARED FOX. LOOK AT THOSE EARS. WHAT A CREATIVE NAME, NAMING AN ANIMAL AFTER ANOTHER ANIMAL!

item.title: It's time to start planning
item.description: Now that the US has fucked up the election, a lot of people will be put in jeopardy. Trans and gay people are directly affected. Others, with Hispanic family may be deported and need concrete plans to best prepare (if forcebly shipped abroad). The imgur community did an excellent job during corona gathering essential information on what to do in emergencies. Although we are mourning the loss of democracy in the US, we still CAN and SHOULD help those who are marginalised. This is me urging all of you knowledgeable people to make posts and link posts to support each other. Examples of how-tos could be: -How to apply for a passport -How to apply for visas based persecution -How to gain access to birth control if it's banned in your state -How to gain access to abortion or abortion pills if it's not available to you in your state -What resources should I keep in case of local emergencies (power shortages) -What to consider when getting a gun, and how to use it -Access to housing for homeless -Access to food if you're unemployed -Tools to help take care of family (esp. the elderly) This might die in user sub, but I *can't* NOT do something to try to help. The US isn't my country, but I'm devestated.
item.dc:creator: MissSiesta
